column3: ,B Team Update,I'm in San Antonio the whole week. I'll miss to see you this time.

column1: I spoke with Bruce last Friday and he had to make a business trip to the Bahamas so he wants the meeting to be shifted to the 1st of November unless we want to meet without him.
